title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ashok Leyland - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ashok Leyland - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ashok Leyland! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ashok Leyland:
Ashok Leyland is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ashok Leyland!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
